title: WorkflowManifest
description: Full manifest describing a workflow run – persisted in Postgres / MinIO. This is the snapshot loaded by the Temporal workflow at runtime to drive graph execution.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow run. Typically a UUID.

graph.description: The executable graph definition for this workflow run.

variables.description: Run-level variables (initial state) available to all nodes during execution. Keys are variable names, values are arbitrary JSON.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata attached to the manifest (e.g. tenant_id, created_by, tags, version). Not used during execution but useful for auditing and filtering.

created_by.description: User or service that created this manifest.
